zh.lifeSummary: 當Uta von Neuffen於1219年出生在多易傑斯 萊奇時，她的父親Albert I von Neuffen34歲，母親Liutgard von Everstein24歲。她和Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1271年5月8日在德國巴登-爾特波格雷姆斯-姆-可萊斯吉賀格 安 德 姆爾享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Neuffen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Neuffen in Württemberg. Compare   Niver  .

nameMeanings.name: Uta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Úna . In Irish legend Úna is the mother of the hero Conn Cétchathach (Conn of the Hundred Battles). It was also the name of the beloved of the 17th-century poet Tomás Láidir Costello : banned by her parents from seeing him, Úna fell into a decline and died, leaving him to mourn her in his verse. The Anglicized form of the name is sometimes taken to be from the feminine of Latin unus ‘one’. It is the name used by Spenser for the lady of the Red Cross Knight in The Faerie Queene: he probably had Latin rather than Irish in mind, even though he worked in Ireland for a while. The Irish name has also been Anglicized as Unity , Juno , Winifred , and Agnes .

variants.name: Una
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Úna . In Irish legend Úna is the mother of the hero Conn Cétchathach (Conn of the Hundred Battles). It was also the name of the beloved of the 17th-century poet Tomás Láidir Costello : banned by her parents from seeing him, Úna fell into a decline and died, leaving him to mourn her in his verse. The Anglicized form of the name is sometimes taken to be from the feminine of Latin unus ‘one’. It is the name used by Spenser for the lady of the Red Cross Knight in The Faerie Queene: he probably had Latin rather than Irish in mind, even though he worked in Ireland for a while. The Irish name has also been Anglicized as Unity , Juno , Winifred , and Agnes .

variants.name: Oonagh
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Úna . In Irish legend Úna is the mother of the hero Conn Cétchathach (Conn of the Hundred Battles). It was also the name of the beloved of the 17th-century poet Tomás Láidir Costello : banned by her parents from seeing him, Úna fell into a decline and died, leaving him to mourn her in his verse. The Anglicized form of the name is sometimes taken to be from the feminine of Latin unus ‘one’. It is the name used by Spenser for the lady of the Red Cross Knight in The Faerie Queene: he probably had Latin rather than Irish in mind, even though he worked in Ireland for a while. The Irish name has also been Anglicized as Unity , Juno , Winifred , and Agnes .

variants.name: Juno
meanings: Anglicized form of the Irish name Úna , assimilated to the name of the Roman goddess Juno, consort of Jupiter.

en.lifeSummary: When Uta von Neuffen was born in 1219, in German Empire, her father, Albert I von Neuffen, was 34 and her mother, Liutgard von Everstein, was 24. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten. She died on 8 May 1271, in Kirchberg an der Murr, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 52.

Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten. Elle est décédée le 8 mai 1271, à Kirchberg an der Murr, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 52 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Uta von Neuffen(이)가 1219년 데우츠체스 라이치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albert I von Neuffen(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Liutgard von Everstein(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 5월 8일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 렘스-머-크레이스 커ch버그 앤 데르 머르에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Uta von Neuffen родилась в 1219 г. в местности деуцчесь раич, её отцу по имени Albert I von Neuffen было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Liutgard von Everstein, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten. Она умерла 8 мая 1271 г. в местности кирчбирг ан дир мурр, ремс-мурр-крис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 52 лет.
